text.title: AI Leverage Estimation Model Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on three observables (past throughput data available, domain regulated/novel, buyer accepts multiplier disclosure) to apply / fall back to PERT / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Operator has ≥3 comparable past tasks logged in last 90 days?

branch.question: Domain regulated or novel without AI track record?

branch.when: domain in {regulated, novel} AND no_ai_evidence == true

conclusion.verdict: fall back to PERT; document fallback_reason

branch.when: domain not in {regulated, novel} OR ai_evidence_present == true
branch.question: Buyer accepts multiplier-band disclosure?

conclusion.verdict: apply full rubric: classify, multiply, audit, calibrate
apply rubric internally; expose only mid-band total externally
fall back to PERT; collect throughput rows for next engagement

text.example: past_throughput_rows=18 → domain=ecommerce (not regulated, not novel) → buyer_accepts_disclosure=true → apply-full-rubric (rule task-class-mandatory).
